name: Helia Group Limited
analysis: HLI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.4350, stop A$4.6035, target A$7.9295 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
